title: taraxacum alatopetiolum
intro: Taraxacum alatopetiolum, also known as the Altai dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in vitamins A, C, and D, as well as minerals like potassium and iron, and has been used to support liver and kidney health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate digestive issues. Taraxacum alatopetiolum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, often in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
